• Upload an image to crush and control stop point, speed, and volume.
  • Press, retract, reset, and auto‑record the simulation with sound effects.
  • Share the simulator via X/Twitter, Facebook, or Reddit.
    canvas captureStream → MediaRecorder → download
    AudioContext oscillators → gain → MediaStreamDestination

This page simulates a hydraulic press that compresses a user‑chosen image, playing dynamic motor sounds and a metal clang on impact. Users can adjust parameters, record the animation with audio, and share the experience on social media. The script handles animation, audio synthesis, and automatic video recording.
